textByHashes.db0f609a90dbd47612b86a87b9a834530e29bbd6: I see you have the unholy symbol of our Lord. It is blessed with the Lord Zamorak's power.
textByHashes.685d3a8a98a8253603a8b86a1d9afe280f7b51e0: Come to me when your faith weakens.
textByHashes.201848e3dcff925a86dfaa4e9df345bd74a8d53d: I see you have the unholy symbol of our Lord. I will bless it for you.
textByHashes.b0c53b67041f674d74674c0c5116cf4425922a32: The symbol of our Lord has been blessed with power!
textByHashes.5afa0ad4e9db602627494cb2a74e1a43d73f966f: No blessings will be given to those who have no symbol of our Lord's love.
textByHashes.738d8602fcb17b364e180af6e0a83a5415cb78e6: To lose an object is easy to replace. To lose the affections of our Lord is impossible to forgive.
textByHashes.050c2759f8d7721f38e74d0e1089fe7f1218ce80: One you already have, another is not needed.
textByHashes.3903c3647903e05e64b216606df9d87eb27b9a24: The might of mortals, to me, is as the dust to the sea.
textByHashes.4477f711dfd6e2624b489f026ec67e428f74e314: Indeed, I feel you have beheld the far places in the heavens.
textByHashes.c058c647a378253aa5596ce4a3501967a79779bc: My Lord instructs me to help you.
textByHashes.36a4e9aa9db2cdbd5642565c8d4e9407b27770a0: Here is a mould to make a token for our Lord; a mould for the unholy symbol of Zamorak.
